name: Next Airing Episode
description: Shows when the next unaired episode of a series will air directly on the series detail page.
overview: Injects a small badge into the Jellyfin series detail page showing the upcoming episode name, season and episode number, and air date. No external services required.

versions.changelog: Rewrites Jellyfin's concrete listItem-largeImage episode row structure directly instead of relying on heuristic text-node matching.
